name: Artillery_Mech

infobox.Systems: Artemis Artillery(Ranged)EffectPowerful artillery strike, damaging a single tile and pushing adjacent tiles.(1 damage)Upgrade IBuildings Immune ()This attack will no longer damage Grid Buildings.Upgrade II+2 Damage ()Increases damage by 2.

sections.Team: The mech is available as part of theRift Walkerssquad.
sections.Strategy:
The Artillery Mech is best suited for long range combat and performs poorly at close range. Its Artemis Artillery cannon can hit enemies from across the map, which is useful for dealing with enemies that are out of range or behind obstacles such as mountains. It's a frail Mech to start, so it appreciates pilots with an ability that can bump its health up or provide a protectiveShield.
The pushing effect caused by its cannon can be used to push several enemies away and protect buildings; thus, it is recommended to unlock theBuildings Immuneupgrade as early as possible, which allows the Artillery Mech to push all enemies adjacent to a building tile. The utility of pushing many enemies away often outweighs the damage done to enemies, particularly in higher difficulties and in congested maps. However, if the map is more open, the Reactor Core can also be swapped around to more Mech movement in the early-game. Both are recommended to be online eventually by theVolcanic Hive, as the map layout is not preview-able.
The additional+2 damageupgrade should also be considered later in the run, especially if the next island hasDiggersor theShell Psion; the increased damage will allow the Artemis Cannon to dispatch these enemies more quickly.
